title: React Query Quiz
description: Test your server state management knowledge with TanStack Query.

questions.question: What is the purpose of the queryKey in React Query?

options.text: It is the HTTP method for the request
It uniquely identifies the query for caching and refetching; when it changes, the query refetches
It is the API endpoint URL
It is a security token for authentication
Marks matching cached queries as stale so they refetch on next use
Clears the entire React Query cache

questions.question: What is the difference between 'staleTime' and 'gcTime' in React Query?

options.text: staleTime: how long data is considered fresh (no refetch); gcTime: how long unused data stays in cache before removal
staleTime controls error retry delays; gcTime controls success delays
staleTime is for mutations; gcTime is for queries
